name: Sai Teja Ragula
title: AI Engineer | LLM Integration | GenAI | Full Stack
expectedSalary: Open to discussion based on role and total compensation
summary: AI Engineer with 5+ years of software development experience and hands-on expertise building production AI applications with Large Language Models (LLMs). Skilled in LLM integration, multi-model orchestration, and prompt engineering using Gemini, Claude, and Vertex AI. Experienced developing AI-powered features for enterprise applications including intelligent automation, NLP-based systems, and agentic workflows. Strong full stack foundation with Java/Spring Boot backend and React/TypeScript frontend. Proficient in deploying AI systems on cloud platforms (GCP, AWS) with focus on scalability and reliability. IBM Certified in Prompt Engineering with Oracle AI Foundations certification.

experience.title: AI/Software Engineer
highlights: Integrate LLM capabilities into enterprise applications using Vertex AI and Google Cloud Platform
Develop AI-powered features including NLP-based SMS integration and intelligent automation workflows
Build multi-model orchestration systems to route requests to appropriate AI models based on task complexity
Implement prompt engineering techniques to optimize LLM responses for customer-facing applications
Design RESTful APIs connecting AI services to frontend applications
Build full stack features using Java/Spring Boot backend and React/TypeScript frontend
Deploy AI-integrated applications on GCP using Docker and Kubernetes
Implement event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka for real-time AI processing pipelines
Achieve 90%+ code coverage through comprehensive testing of AI integrations

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Developed backend services using Java/Spring Boot for enterprise applications
Built RESTful APIs and microservices with focus on scalability

highlights: Built full stack applications using Java/Spring Boot and React/JavaScript

projects.name: Wealthix – AI-Powered Financial Intelligence Platform
projects.description: AI-powered financial platform with multi-model orchestration using Gemini 1.5 and Claude. Implemented Hybrid Router pattern to dynamically select optimal LLM based on query complexity. Built RAG pipeline for context-aware responses using document embeddings. Deployed on AWS with monitoring and observability.

projects.name: AI Financial Co-Pilot – Automated Dispute Engine
projects.description: Agentic AI workflow for automated financial dispute resolution. Claude 3.5 integration for intelligent document analysis, prompt engineering pipelines for consistent AI outputs, real-time dashboard for dispute tracking.

projects.name: AI Call Screener
projects.description: AI agent intercepting recruiter calls — Twilio phone layer, Deepgram real-time STT, Claude for reasoning from resume, ElevenLabs TTS voice synthesis. Spring Boot backend.
